summary: Comprehensive testing of Point Financier feature with consent-based signing. All backend tests passed (24/24). Frontend workflow fully verified: Point Financier moved to Hebdo tab, consent-based signing, PDF viewer, admin unlock/delete controls.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points/{id}/sign - consent-based signing (no signature_data, uses consent_text)
✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points/{id}/unlock - admin unlocks signed point for modification
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/financial-points/{id} - only admin can delete signed
✅ Frontend: Navigate to /caisse, login as Admin (password Caisse2026)
✅ Frontend: Point Financier is now under Hebdo tab > Point Financier sub-tab
✅ Frontend: Rapport tab no longer has Point Financier sub-tab (only Rapport Journalier)
✅ Frontend: Create a point, admin validate, then sign via consent checkbox modal
✅ Frontend: After signing, view switches to PDF mode with Consulter/Telecharger PDF buttons
✅ Frontend: Admin sees 'Autoriser la modification' and 'Supprimer' buttons on signed point
✅ Frontend: Manager (PIN 2468) can view but NOT validate, unlock, or delete signed points
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test financial point during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Point Financier feature fully working with consent-based signing. Key changes from previous iteration: (1) Point Financier moved from Rapport tab to Hebdo tab as sub-tab, (2) Signing is now consent-based (checkbox) instead of canvas signature, (3) New /unlock endpoint allows admin to re-open signed points, (4) /pdf endpoint returns HTML document displayed in iframe. All role-based permissions working correctly.

point_financier_location.notes: Point Financier is under Hebdo tab > Point Financier sub-tab

rapport_tab_structure.notes: Rapport tab only shows Rapport Journalier, no Point Financier sub-tab

create_point.notes: Manager/Admin can create weekly/daily financial points with payment amounts

admin_validate.notes: Admin can validate pending points, status changes to 'admin_validated'

consent_signing.notes: Consent checkbox modal appears, must check to enable sign button

pdf_view_mode.notes: After signing, view switches to PDF mode with Consulter/Telecharger buttons

pdf_viewer_modal.notes: PDF viewer shows HTML document with all point details, signatures, consent text

admin_unlock.notes: Admin can unlock signed point for modification via 'Autoriser la modification' button

admin_delete.notes: Admin can delete signed points via 'Supprimer' button

manager_permissions.notes: Manager can view/create but cannot validate, unlock, or delete signed points

backend_api_tests.POST /api/financial-points (weekly): PASS - Creates weekly point with all amounts
backend_api_tests.GET /api/financial-points/{id}/pdf (unsi: PASS - Returns HTML with pending status
